name: tok_double_colon_bind
description: a::b — first ':' is ConstraintBind (no spaces). Its RHS branch checks is_expression_start on next token ':' which is NOT in is_expression_start, so name stays nil giving Constraint(a,nil). Outer loop sees second ':' as ConstraintBind again with name=b. Constraint(Constraint(a,nil), b). UNCERTAIN.
